title: 5 Pack Mini Torch Lighter Windproof Jet Flame Butane Gas Pocket Refillable for Candles, Outdoor, fireworks, Camping, Fireplaces, Gas Stoves, Ovens, BBQ & Survival Gear (Butane not included)
features: 【Multipurpose Butane Lighter】Mini Jet Torch Butane Lighter, ideal for a variety of uses from igniting candles, fireworks, and grills to practical applications in lighting fireplaces, gas stoves, and ovens, as well as being an essential tool for camping, crafts like melting the ends of paracord for bracelets or setting small pieces of artwork on fire for effect., and numerous other indoor and outdoor activities.

【Touch-friendly Surface】The sleek surface suggests a consistent, even coating that enhances the tactile experience and could possibly resist fingerprints and smudges, which is a practical feature for an object handled frequently. The uniformity of the surface suggests a high-quality manufacturing process, resulting in a durable and fingerprint-resistant exterior.
【Aesthetic Appeal】Enhance your lighter's appearance with a matte finish that's as stylish as it is practical, matching any personal aesthetic or professional toolkit.
【Pocket-Friendly Portability】Keep your torch on hand wherever you go with its compact design, easily fitting into pockets, backpacks, or emergency kits.
【Visible Fuel Gauge】Designed with a clear fuel chamber, the lighter provides immediate visibility of the fuel level at the bottom, allowing for timely refills and continuous use.

【Windproof Torch Flame】Experience the superior performance of a wind-resistant torch lighter, the flame emerges from a protected nozzle, indicative of a wind-resistant feature, perfect for outdoor enthusiasts and anyone needing a reliable flame in challenging conditions.
【Precision Flame Control】Personalize your flame with a precision control dial, ideal for Candles, as well as for culinary experts who demand accuracy.
【Refillable & Reusable】Embrace sustainability with a butane refillable lighter insert, cutting down on waste and saving money over disposable options.

【Outdoor Recreation】A wind-resistant feature makes the lighter a reliable tool for outdoor enthusiasts. Whether for lighting a campfire while hiking, igniting a grill during a picnic, or providing a flame for warmth and cooking in a survival situation, the lighter's robust design ensures functionality in various weather conditions.

【Emergency Preparedness】In emergency kits, a reliable lighter is a must-have for disaster preparedness, whether for sterilizing medical instruments, sealing makeshift bandages, or providing light during power outages.
description: Product Description How many lighters can you get? Note: For safety and compliance with shipping regulations, this lighter is delivered without fuel . Before first use, please refill with butane gas. If you prefer a pre-filled lighter, this product may not be suitable for your needs. Specifications: Material: Plastic + Metal Fuel: Butane Gas (not included) Package Contents: • 1 × Red Lighter • 1 × Black Lighter • 1 × Blue Lighter • 1 × Orange Lighter • 1 × Yellow Lighter Usage Instructions: Refill only with high-quality butane gas for optimal performance. Insert the butane canister nozzle vertically into the refill valve and press firmly. After refilling, allow 3–5 minutes for the gas to stabilize before ignition. If leakage occurs, confirm that the refill nozzle size is compatible with the lighter’s valve. Open the lid to ignite and adjust the flame size. There is a charging port at the bottom, so you can fill butane gas at any time when the fuel is low.
